metadata.title: Weblyfe.ai | AI automation agency
metadata.description: We build AI systems that handle your leads, support, and operations 24/7. Custom chatbots, workflow automation, and digital employees for growing businesses.

hero.subtitle: We build AI systems that handle your leads, support, and operations 24/7. Focus on the work that actually matters.
hero.microcopy: No coding required • No monthly retainers • Just results

services.label: Our services
services.title: AI solutions that
services.subtitle: From simple automations to full digital employees: we build AI systems tailored to your specific business needs.

workflow.title: Workflow automation
workflow.headline: Connect everything. Automate anything.
workflow.description: Your tools should talk to each other without you playing middleman. We build custom automation flows that connect your CRM, email, calendar, Notion, Slack, and 400+ other apps.
workflow.benefit1: Instant data sync across all tools

chatbots.title: AI chatbots
chatbots.headline: 24/7 support that sounds like you
chatbots.description: Your customers don't want to wait until Monday morning. Our AI chatbots handle inquiries, book appointments, and answer FAQs instantly. Trained on your brand voice.
chatbots.benefit2: Smart routing to humans when needed

training.title: Training bots
training.headline: AI that knows your business inside out
training.description: Generic AI gives generic answers. We train custom AI models on YOUR content (your docs, processes, FAQs) so it becomes an expert on your specific business.

crm.title: AI-powered CRM
crm.headline: Leads scored, sorted, and followed up
crm.description: Stop letting hot leads go cold. Our AI-powered CRM scores every lead instantly, sends personalized follow-ups, and alerts you when someone's ready to buy.

employee.title: Digital employee
employee.headline: Hire an AI team member
employee.description: This isn't a chatbot. It's a digital employee. Powered by our Appie system, it handles scheduling, research, content drafts, CRM updates, and email management. Unlimited tasks. No PTO.

services.ctaText: Book a free strategy call and we'll map out the perfect AI solution for your business.

caseStudies.label: Case studies
caseStudies.title: Real results,
caseStudies.subtitle: Not concepts. Not demos. Real AI systems running real businesses right now. Every stat is verifiable. Every client is reachable.
caseStudies.cta: Ready to be our next success story?

leadMagnet.title: The AI automation playbook
leadMagnet.subtitle: Learn how to automate repetitive tasks and scale your business with AI. No developers needed. No coding required.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: From idea to
howItWorks.subtitle: A clear, proven process that takes you from overwhelmed to automated in weeks, not months.

step1.title: Discovery call
step1.description: We learn about your business, pain points, and goals. No pitch, just understanding what you actually need.

step2.title: Custom roadmap
step2.description: We design a tailored AI strategy with clear milestones, timelines, and expected ROI. You know exactly what you're getting.

step3.title: Build & launch
step3.description: Our team builds your AI solution. You get regular updates and can test throughout. No surprises at launch.

step4.title: Optimize & scale
step4.description: We monitor performance, gather feedback, and continuously improve. Your AI gets smarter over time.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: What our
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it. Hear from the founders and teams we've helped automate.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Questions?
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about working with us. Can't find what you're looking for? Just ask. We're here to help.
faq.q1: How long does it take to build an AI automation?
faq.a1: Most projects take 2-4 weeks from kickoff to launch. Simple chatbots can be ready in 1-2 weeks, while complex multi-agent systems may take 4-6 weeks. We give you a clear timeline during the strategy call.
faq.q2: Do I need technical knowledge to use these systems?
faq.a2: Not at all. We build everything for you and create simple dashboards so you can monitor performance. Training is included, and we provide ongoing support to make sure you're comfortable.
faq.q3: What's the cost of AI automation services?
faq.a3: Projects typically start at €2,500 for simple automations and scale based on complexity. We offer one-time builds (you own everything) or managed services with monthly support. You get a clear quote before we start.
faq.q4: Will the AI sound like a robot?
faq.a4: No. We train AI on your brand voice, tone, and communication style. Most customers can't tell they're talking to AI. We fine-tune until it sounds exactly like your team would respond.
faq.a5: We build with failsafes. Complex queries route to humans, and you always have override controls. Plus, we include 30 days of support after launch, and offer ongoing maintenance packages.
faq.q6: Can you integrate with my existing tools?
faq.a6: Yes. We work with 400+ apps including Notion, Slack, Gmail, HubSpot, Salesforce, Airtable, WhatsApp, and custom APIs. If it has an API, we can connect it.
faq.a7: Absolutely. We follow industry best practices: encrypted connections, secure API handling, and we never store your data beyond what's needed. For sensitive industries, we can discuss additional security measures.
faq.q8: What if I need changes after launch?
faq.a8: Changes are normal! We include a revision period after launch. For ongoing tweaks, we offer support packages or you can make simple changes yourself through the dashboards we provide.

booking.subtitle: Pick a time that works for you. We'll discuss your business, identify opportunities, and show you what's possible with AI.
